source: independent (non-author) general-purpose agent reviewing data/aggregates/build-reasoning.json against the source kit+items; suggested rewrites ground-checked by copy-verify, then applied back

support.quote: Little kill power — Adele leans on landing Imperial Lash and her ultimate; whiff them and she does little, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
support.issue: overconfident/misleading vs kit's strong true damage
support.rewrite: Low burst on her own — Adele leans on landing Imperial Lash and Queen's Garden to lock targets down; whiff them and she mostly just soaks damage.

support.quote: Magic armor and mana so your aura/spells keep poking off-cooldown.
support.issue: Adele has no aura; Inquisition is a single proc
support.rewrite: Magic armor and mana, with a periodic energy wave that chips nearby enemies.

offlane.issue: Adele has no aura; Inquisition is a single proc
offlane.rewrite: Magic armor and mana, with a periodic energy wave that chips nearby enemies.

support.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Phase useless without a strong linked ally; alone she has no damage or escape.
support.issue: overstated — Phase has damaging abilities (Psychic Flare, Energy Lance)
support.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Phase is much weaker without a strong linked ally, and alone she has little burst and no escape.

jungle.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Rampage telegraphed boulder windup; without the ultimate he's a slow, low-burst tank.
jungle.issue: broken English, missing verb ("Rampage telegraphed boulder windup")
jungle.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Rampage's boulder has a telegraphed windup, and without his ultimate he's a slow, low-burst tank.

jungle.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Rampage survives the fight.
jungle.issue: wrong stats — Viper gives no armor or health
jungle.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed, power and penetration, shredding the target's armor as you stack hits.

midlane.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Renna Abyssal Rift channel is long and obvious; she's fragile while setting it up.
midlane.issue: broken English, missing possessive/verb ("Renna Abyssal Rift channel is long")
midlane.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Renna's Abyssal Rift channel is long and obvious, leaving her fragile while she sets it up.

support.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Renna Abyssal Rift channel is long and obvious; she's fragile while setting it up.
support.issue: broken English, missing possessive/verb ("Renna Abyssal Rift channel is long")
support.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Renna's Abyssal Rift channel is long and obvious, leaving her fragile while she sets it up.

carry.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Revenant Reckoning locks him alone with the target; misjudge it and he dies one-on-one.
carry.issue: broken English, missing possessive ("Revenant Reckoning locks him")
carry.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Revenant's Reckoning locks him alone with one target, so misjudge it and he dies one-on-one.

carry.quote: Dropping Terminus costs Revenant crit consistency.
carry.issue: mischaracterizes Terminus — its identity is the overheal shield/lifesteal, not crit consistency
carry.rewrite: Dropping Terminus costs Revenant lifesteal and the shield it banks from excess healing.

midlane.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Revenant survives the fight.
midlane.issue: wrong stats — Viper gives attack speed/power/penetration, not armor or survivability
midlane.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed, power and penetration that strips enemy armor as Revenant keeps attacking.

support.quote: Build steady power and attack speed so Riktor can Riplash hook into Shock Therapy and Skewer suppression, halting cooldowns with Suspended Sentence and out-damage the support fight over time.
support.issue: misleading — this support build is pure armor/health items, not power or attack speed
support.rewrite: Build armor and health so Riktor can Riplash hook into Shock Therapy and Skewer suppression, halting cooldowns with Suspended Sentence and survive long enough to lock down the support fight.

jungle.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Serath survives the fight.
jungle.issue: wrong stats — Viper gives attack speed/power/penetration, not armor or survivability
jungle.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed, power and penetration that strips enemy armor as Serath keeps attacking.

offlane.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Serath survives the fight.
offlane.issue: wrong stats — Viper gives attack speed/power/penetration, not armor or survivability
offlane.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed, power and penetration that strips enemy armor as Serath keeps attacking.

offlane.quote: Stack armor and health early so Shinbi can stack All-Kill Marks with Line Tempo and the wolves, then detonate Marks in a teamfight and survive long enough to matter as offlane.
offlane.issue: misleading — these are all magical power items, none give armor
offlane.rewrite: Stack power and health early so Shinbi can stack All-Kill Marks with Line Tempo and the wolves, then detonate Marks in a teamfight as offlane.
